Start from previous frame: dust continues clearing revealing a Terminator T-800 Endoskeleton, exposed hydraulic pistons at elbows and knees, thin metallic rib cage structure, visible spine rods, skull with fixed grin, polished chrome metal reflecting dim fire light, proportions strictly human-like skeleton, no armor, no bulky parts, no sci-fi redesign

camera slowly moves sideways (not rotating too much), keeping full body centered, dust and embers drifting naturally, cinematic lighting, ultra realistic, photoreal, consistent with previous frame
